name: Couscous Risotto w/ Wild Mushrooms & Pecorino Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1/3 Cup Shallots or Green Onions, chopped
4 Cups Rich Chicken or Vegetable Stock
1/2 Cup Firm Ripe Tomato, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic; sauté until lightly colored.
2. Stir in shiitake mushrooms and cook for 3-4 minutes until they begin to release their liquid.
3. Add couscous and stir until the grains are coated with oil.
4. Pour in white wine and stir occasionally, allowing the alcohol to evaporate. Cook for about 5 minutes.
5. Gradually add hot stock, one cup at a time, stirring constantly until each addition is absorbed before adding more.
6. Once all the stock is incorporated and the couscous is creamy with little liquid remaining, remove from heat.
7. Stir in lemon zest, tomatoes, chives, and Pecorino cheese. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Serve hot, garnished with grilled or roasted wild mushrooms and scallions, if desired.
Yield: 6 servings
